rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies a real proof-quality issue at line 73: `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` silently relies on the global simp set (notably `Set.mem_singleton_iff`) and should use `simp only` with all contributing lemmas listed. In Lean 4/Mathlib formalization this is a genuine maintainability concern, not merely stylistic. Review 2 misses it entirely.
